triage_rows.detail: Do not treat the current wider sell shadow as if its reference quantities were real holdings; most sessions are only partially funded or unfunded relative to the frozen EOD primary.
The next justified step is a holdings-aware ledger that converts frozen EOD positions into sellable start-of-day intraday state.
A same-day precedence rule is required because some sell-side candidates collide with same-day primary open/add/reduce actions.
Keep this step sell-side only; do not pull reentry execution or full replay binding into the holdings-aware buildout.

interpretation: V1.34BV converts the holdings-aware audit into a practical direction judgment.
The branch should next build a start-of-day holdings-aware sell surface plus same-day precedence policy, not pretend the current wider shadow can bind directly into the frozen EOD primary.
